Mtn Tp Strike Req For Exemplar Damages From Complt
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: appearances: william gilg, esq., 650.871.8647, for plaintiff gahan.
edward reesha, esq., law offices of catherine a. walsh, 925.825.9500, for defendant campbell.

ruling: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT JOHN CAMPBELL'S Motion To Strike Request For Exemplary Damages From Complaint. Denied. The request for punitive damages is adequately pled. defendant has 20 days to file his answer. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Mtn Tp Strike Req For Exemplar Damages From Complt
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Continued To Aug-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roy Woo, Esq. of the Law Office of Catherin Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500 x821, for Defendant and moving party, via courtcall;
Timothy J. Kodani, Esq. of the L/O of Timothy Kodani, Tel. 415.951.4640, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentive ruling and DEFENDANT JOHN CAMPBELL'S Motion To Strike Request For Exemplar Damages From Complaint is continued to August 30, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of the motion as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
